novel_features.name: Unified player dossier
novel_features.description: Type any player name and get market value, EA FC rating, potential, and key stats in one report.

novel_features.name: Team squad value+rating board
novel_features.description: Type a club name and get the full squad with each player's market value and rating, plus squad totals.

novel_features.name: Market-vs-game divergence
novel_features.description: Flag players whose transfer-market value is far above or below their EA game rating.

novel_features.name: Potential growth gap
novel_features.description: Rank players by headroom (potential minus current rating).

novel_features.name: Cross-source head-to-head
novel_features.description: Side-by-side value, rating, potential, and stats for two players.

novel_features.name: Wonderkid scout query
novel_features.description: Find young players with high potential and rising market value.
